question: What is the main reason people throw rice dumplings into the river during the Dragon Boat Festival?
options: To feed the fish so they won't eat Chew U's body
To make the river look colorful
answer_en: To feed the fish so they won't eat Chew U's body
answer_zh: 為了餵魚，讓魚不吃屈原的身體
answer_ja: To feed the fish so they won't
answer_local: To feed the fish so they won't eat Chew U's body
answer_local_pron: To feed the fish so they wont eat Chew Us body
explanation_zh: 人們把粽子丟進河裡，是為了餵魚，讓魚不去吃屈原的身體。

question: Who was Chew U.N.?
options: famous poet and loyal official in ancient China
answer_en: famous poet and loyal official in ancient China
answer_zh: 中國古代著名的詩人和忠誠官員
answer_ja: A famous poet and loyal offici
answer_local: A famous poet and loyal official in ancient China
answer_local_pron: A famous poet and loyal official in ancient China
explanation_zh: 屈原是中國古代著名的詩人和忠誠的官員。

question: Why did Chew U.N. jump into the Milo River?
options: ecause his country had fallen apart and he was very sad
ecause he was afraid of dragons
answer_en: ecause his country had fallen apart and he was very sad
answer_zh: 因為他的國家已經瓦解，他非常悲傷
answer_local: Because his country had fallen apart and he was very sad
answer_local_pron: Because his country had fallen apart and he was very sad
explanation_zh: 屈原因為國家瓦解，感到非常悲傷，於是跳入汨羅江。

question: What do people do during the Dragon Boat Festival besides eating rice dumplings?
answer_en: Watch exciting dragon boat races
answer_local: Watch exciting dragon boat races
answer_local_pron: Watch exciting dragon boat races
explanation_zh: 除了吃粽子，人們還會觀看刺激的龍舟比賽。

question: What was the purpose of making loud noises by beating drums during the festival?
answer_en: To scare the fish away
answer_local: To scare the fish away
answer_local_pron: To scare the fish away
explanation_zh: 敲鼓發出大聲響是為了嚇跑魚，保護屈原的身體。

question: When is the Dragon Boat Festival celebrated?
options: On the fifth day of the fifth lunar month
On the first day of the lunar new year
On the fifteenth day of the eighth lunar month
On the tenth day of the tenth lunar month
answer_en: On the fifth day of the fifth lunar month
answer_ja: On the fifth day of the fifth
answer_local: On the fifth day of the fifth lunar month
answer_local_pron: On the fifth day of the fifth lunar month
explanation_zh: 端午節是在農曆五月初五慶祝的。

question: What did Chew U.N. do to express his sadness?
answer_en: He wrote beautiful poems
answer_local: He wrote beautiful poems
answer_local_pron: He wrote beautiful poems
explanation_zh: 屈原用美麗的詩歌表達他的悲傷。

question: Why did some officials drive Chew U.N. away from the capital?
options: ecause they were jealous of him
answer_en: ecause they were jealous of him
answer_ja: Because they were jealous of h
answer_local: Because they were jealous of him
answer_local_pron: Because they were jealous of him
explanation_zh: 一些官員嫉妒屈原，將他驅逐出都城。

options: hew U.N.'s loyalty and love for his country
answer_en: hew U.N.'s loyalty and love for his country

answer_ja: Chew U.N.'s loyalty and love f

answer_local_pron: Chew UNs loyalty and love for his country

answer_en: Milo River

question: What did people do to protect Chew U.N.'s body from fish?

uilt a fence around the river

answer_en: Work with small states
answer_local: Work with small states

explanation_zh: 屈原建議與小國合作對抗大國。

y painting dragon pictures on the boats

options: Throw rice dumplings and row dragon boats quickly
